description.from:
Deals 267*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ATK 168.3% Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times, and inflicts Down for 1.5 sec.

[God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, attack range increases by 50%, and Down duration increases by 0.5 sec.
description.to:
Deals 267*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+168.3% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times and inflicts Down for 1.5 sec.
[God's Proxy] : Damage increases by 25%, attack range increases by 50%, and Down duration increases by 0.5 sec.

description.from:
Dashes behind the enemy and deals 233*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ATK 146.9% Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by 24% for 5 sec.

[God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied 600 higher.
description.to:
Dashes behind the enemy and deals 233*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+146.9% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by 30% for 4 sec.
[God's Proxy] : Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied 500 higher.

description.from:
Deals 200*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+126% ATK Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for 1 sec, then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, enhancing skills.

[God's Proxy]: ATK increases by 314*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), and Normal Attack DMG increases by 100%. This effect cannot be dispelled.
description.to:
Deals 200*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+126% ATK Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for 2 sec. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, empowering skills.
[God's Proxy] : ATK increases by 264*(1+0.3*Skill Level), Attack Speed by 30%, Physical Evasion by 300, Normal Attack DMG by 150%, and Status Resistance by 600. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from:
ATK increases by 192*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), and Magic Evasion increases by 240.

When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 20%, and damage taken from non-hero enemies is reduced by 20%.
description.to:
Magic DEF increases by 85*(1+0.3*Skill Level), and Magic Evasion increases by 250.
When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 30%, and damage taken is reduced by 30%.

dark.to: When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%.

dark.from: On hit, increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 24% for 5 sec.
dark.to: On hit, reduces the target’s Physical DEF by 35% for 10 sec.

light.from: Physical Evasion increases by 140 for the duration.
light.to: Reduces Physical DMG taken by 25% during the duration.

dark.from: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 34% for the duration.
dark.to: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 100% during the duration.

light.to:
Physical Evasion increases by 150.
On evasion, restores 5% of Max HP. This effect can only trigger once every 3 sec.

dark.from: On evasion, restores 6% of Max HP every 3 sec.
dark.to: Damage taken from Heroes is reduced by 15%.

description.from: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 5 times and is irremovable.
description.to: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times and is irremovable.

description.from: [Valiant Dash] Stuns the target for 1.5 sec, and reduces Cooldown by {0}% upon a Critical Hit.
description.to: [Valiant Dash] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Cooldown by 10% upon a Crit Hit.

description.from: [Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional 400 and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.
description.to: [Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional 250 and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.

description.from: [Goddess Strike] Increases Magic Evasion by 360 and increases DMG dealt to heroes by {0}%.
description.to: [Goddess Strike] Increases DEF Boost by 50%, and own DMG dealt to bosses by {0}%.

dark.from: On hit, deals additional Physical DMG equal to 60% of ATK. Applied at 120% against non-hero enemies and can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
dark.to: On hit, deals additional Physical DMG equal to 80% of ATK. Applied at 160% against non-hero enemies and can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
